description_long: This house features a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements, with a brick facade on one side and light-colored siding on the others. The front yard is landscaped with a large tree and a driveway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small porch and steps. The structure is primarily single-story, with a partial second story visible at the center, and a flat roof section. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, including large picture windows and smaller, regularly spaced panes. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a patio area. The overall design suggests a comfortable suburban residence with ample outdoor space and a mix of private and communal areas.
description: A suburban house with a brick and siding exterior, landscaped front yard, and fenced backyard. Features include a partial second story, flat roof sections, and a mix of large and small windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, brick facade, driveway, and landscaped yard with a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden fence, patio area, and the transition from brick to siding materials.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio, and multiple windows along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more siding, a secondary entrance, and a clear view of the driveway and smaller tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller regular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single door framed by sidelights and minimal decorative elements
